description: The Pesce 'ndrina is a powerful clan of the 'Ndrangheta, based in Rosarno, Calabria, Italy. Founded in the 1950s by Giuseppe Pesce, it transformed from a rural criminal group into an entrepreneurial organization involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and control of commercial businesses in the Gioia Tauro plain. The clan has been led by Antonino and Salvatore Pesce, both currently imprisoned, with Francesco Pesce taking command. It remains active and influential.
